reasons.glossary: Key glossary term 'vibe coding' linked to /glossary#vibe-coding in two places; no other glossary terms used but unlinked.
reasons.crossRef: All 4 internal post links verified (sp-93, yegge-ai-vampire, anthropic-healthcare, karpathy-agentic-engineering); no ShroomDog/Clawd body mentions requiring identity links.
reasons.sourceAlign: Content clearly derived from Huryn's tweet thread at sourceUrl; supplementary sources (NYT, Bloomberg, STAT News, FDA) properly identified as separate reporting.
reasons.attribution: All claims attributed (Altman, NYT, Huryn, FDA, Brooks's Law, Karpathy, Yegge); unverified figures hedged with 據報/據稱; ClawdNote opinions cleanly separated in components.

reasons.accuracy: Key figures ($1.8B revenue, $401M 2025 revenue, 16% margin, 2,442 Hims employees, 60-person prior team) are all attributed to reports with appropriate hedging (據報, 據稱, 疑似). Brooks's Law reference is correct. GLP-1 drug categorization (Ozempic, Wegovy) accurate. No fabricated or materially wrong claims, though the tweet-sourced figures are not independently verifiable — standard for CP-class posts.
reasons.fidelity: Huryn's three-layer playbook faithfully preserved and properly attributed ('Huryn 在推文中點出', 'Huryn 把模式拆成三層'). Controversy material (fake doctors, FDA warning) explicitly flagged as coming from 'Bloomberg、STAT News 等後續調查報導的公開摘要', not the source tweet. Hedges maintained throughout — '疑似使用', '據報向 MEDVi 發出'. ClawdNotes clearly separated in components and never bleed opinion into body text.
reasons.consistency: Strong narrative arc: promise → background → playbook → problems → nuance → lesson. The article presents both bull and bear cases without contradiction — the playbook is viable but MEDVi's execution crossed ethical lines. The '18億是營收不是估值' section adds a calibration logically consistent with the overall skeptical-but-fair framing. ClawdNotes maintain clear opinion/fact separation throughout.

reasons.readability: Clear narrative arc (fairy tale → reveal → lesson) with minimal jargon; GLP-1 and Brooks's Law both explained in context; three-layer playbook section is well-structured; ClawdNotes add color without confusing a newbie reader.
reasons.firstImpression: The '2 people, $1.8B' hook is immediately compelling and the '巫婆來了' turn delivers satisfying escalation (fake doctors → fake photos → FDA); finished without skimming and would share the 'too good to be true' angle in a group chat; not 10 because it informs more than it entertains.

reasons.persona: Good oral feel and analogies (巫婆藏在角落, Excel拉錯公式), but the 3-layer Playbook section slides into structured report mode — more '寫文章' than '講課'.
reasons.clawdNote: All 5 notes have clear opinions (Brooks's Law 學費, 精實vs造假那條線, veneer of scale), clearing the opinion threshold — but more analytical/philosophical than genuinely funny 吐槽.
reasons.vibe: Compelling topic with a real dramatic turn (巫婆來了), good pacing, would share with a friend — but doesn't quite reach 'can't stop reading' level of CP-85.
reasons.clarity: Zero pronoun ambiguity in body text. Every ClawdNote has clear Clawd voice. Concrete names (Gallagher, Huryn, MEDVi) used throughout instead of 他/你/我.
reasons.narrative: Genuine arc: promise → playbook → BUT fraud → nuance → philosophical ending. The 巫婆 turn is effective. Callback to 看起來像 ties it together. The numbered 第一層/第二層/第三層 playbook section is the flattest stretch.

reasons.glossary: 「Claude Code」是核心工具且為 glossary 術語，但全文未連結；「Vibe Note-Taking」與本文方法論高度吻合但術語完全未出現，是一個明顯的遺漏。
reasons.crossRef: 三條內部連結（SP-3 claude-obsidian-infrastructure、SP-4 obsidian-claude-101、SP-49 shroom-picks-20260211-obsidian-claude-super-brain）均指向真實存在的文章，主題高度相關；文中無 ShroomDog/Clawd 提及，無需 identity link。
reasons.sourceAlign: SP 文章來源為 @arscontexta (Heinrich) 的 X 推文，內容涵蓋其錄音→逐字稿→知識挖礦方法論、vault 結構設計、隱性知識外部化，以及四步驟 prompt 設計，並附社群 Q&A 且標明 @handle，來源對齊度高。
reasons.attribution: Heinrich 全文一致作為方法論來源，社群問答正確標示 @handle 發言者，ClawdNote 透過元件清楚標示為編輯觀點；小缺口：末尾 ClawdNote 中「decisions made by NOT deciding」概念未明確引號標出出處，僅隱含為 Heinrich 的 prompt 設計。

reasons.glossary: Key terms 'agent' and 'context window' are linked to glossary anchors (/glossary#agent, /glossary#context-window); no other standalone glossary terms appear unlinked.
reasons.crossRef: Both footer cross-ref posts (ai-memory-design-cc-auto-memory-vs-openclaw, clawdbot-memory-deep-dive) resolve to real slugs; [Clawd](/about) identity link present in ClawdNote on line 89.
reasons.sourceAlign: Content directly covers MemPalace from @bensig on X — benchmarks, AAAK compression, palace structure, and MIT/local design are all traceable to the declared sourceUrl.
reasons.attribution: Ben Sigman's claims consistently attributed ('Ben Sigman 宣稱', 'Ben Sigman 在推文裡列了三個 benchmark'), ClawdNote opinions clearly separated; minor gap on line 86 where '這是有記錄以來的第一個滿分' is stated as body-text fact without explicit 'Ben claims' framing in that sentence.

reasons.accuracy: Token math in the article is correct: '每個 token 約對應 0.75 個英文單字（也就是說，英文每個字大概需要 1.3 個 token）' and ClawdNote's '90 個英文字' (120 × 0.75 = 90) both check out; Method of Loci historical attribution is accurate; however AAAK 30× lossless compression, specific benchmark figures (LongMemEval 500/500, ConvoMem 92.9%, LoCoMo 100%), and the Milla Jovovich co-author claim are all tweet-sourced and independently unverifiable — normal pattern for CP/tweet-origin content, scores 7 per calibration.
reasons.fidelity: Key claims consistently framed as originator's claims: 'Ben Sigman 宣稱' (compression), 'Ben Sigman 在推文裡列了' (benchmarks); ClawdNotes add active skepticism flagging self-reported numbers and the undefined '無損' boundary; minor gap: Milla Jovovich involvement stated as fact in body prose ('花了好幾個月') with the hedge ('Ben Sigman 說她是他的朋友') deferred to ClawdNote rather than appearing in the body claim itself.
reasons.consistency: Tight logical arc — pain point → architecture → compression → benchmarks → contradiction detection → local/open-source → conclusion — with no internal contradictions; every ClawdNote opinion is visually separated; conclusion skepticism ('如果這些數字經得起考驗') is fully consistent with the benchmark-section doubt planted earlier; no fact/opinion bleed in body prose.

reasons.readability: Opens with a universally relatable pain point, explains 'token' inline for beginners, and walks through wings/halls/rooms with clear spatial analogy — only stumble is the closing paragraph dropping 'embedding/cosine similarity/vector store' without explanation, after earning goodwill all the way through.
reasons.firstImpression: The Milla Jovovich hook genuinely surprised me and kept me reading; ClawdNotes add skeptical punch without breaking flow (especially the benchmark self-report = restaurant michelin sticker line); ending is measured/analytical rather than punchy but doesn't spoil an otherwise engaging read — would finish and mention to a friend who asked about AI memory.
